mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in housing units sold (HOUST) signals a strengthening demand for durable goods, which boosts S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: HOUST fails to predict positive 5-day forward returns in > 50% of instances, or the signal's rank IC falls below 0.02 over any 1-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in industrial production (INDPRO) signals a weakening supply chain, which compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO fails to predict positive 20-day forward returns in > 60% of instances, or the signal's rank IC falls below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in payroll employment (PAYEMS) signals a strengthening labor market, which boosts S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: PAYEMS fails to predict positive 60-day forward returns in > 70% of instances, or the signal's rank IC falls below 0.04 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS) signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: FEDFUNDS fails to predict positive 20-day forward returns in > 50% of instances triggered by the crossing condition, or the signal's rank IC falls below 0.02 over any 1-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in real GDP (GDPC1) signals a strengthening demand for durable goods, which boosts S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 fails to predict positive 5-day forward returns in > 60% of instances, or the signal's rank IC falls below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in industrial production (INDPRO) and a 2-month increase in housing units sold (HOUST) signal a weakening supply chain and strengthening demand for durable goods, which compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal of INDPRO and HOUST fails to predict positive 20-day forward returns in > 70% of instances, or the signal's rank IC falls below 0.04 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in payroll employment (PAYEMS) and a 3-month decline in the unemployment rate (UNRATE) signal a strengthening labor market, which boosts S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal of PAYEMS and UNRATE fails to predict positive 60-day forward returns in > 80% of instances, or the signal's rank IC falls below 0.05 over any 4-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS) and a 2-month increase in real GDP (GDPC1) signal an easing monetary cycle and strengthening demand for durable goods, which compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal of FEDFUNDS and GDPC1 fails to predict positive 20-day forward returns in > 90% of instances, or the signal's rank IC falls below 0.06 over any 5-year rolling window.
